de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class Namespace

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Namespace
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class Namespace
extends Object
implements Serializable
    A Namespace keeps track of already used Names and the objects carrying these names. These objects have to implement the interface Named. It is possible to have nested namespaces in order to represent different visibility scopes. An instance of Namespace can operate in normal and protocoled mode, where the protocoled mode keeps track of all new added names since the last call of startProtocol().
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      protected Named localSym
      One defined symbol.
      protected int numLocalSyms
      The number of symbols defined in this namespace.
      protected Namespace parent
      The fall-back namespace for symbols not present in this Namespace.
      protected HashMap<Name,Named> protocol
      Additions can be "recorded" here
      private static long serialVersionUID 
      protected HashMap<Name,Named> symbols
      The hashmap that maps a name to a symbols of that name if it is defined in this Namespace.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Namespace()
      Construct an empty Namespace without a parent namespace.
      Namespace(HashMap<Name,Named> protocol)
      Construct an empty Namespace with protocol protocol and without a parent namespace.
      Namespace(Namespace parent)
      Construct a Namespace that uses parent as a fallback for finding symbols not defined in this one.
      Namespace(Namespace parent, Named sym)
      Construct a Namespace that uses parent as a fallback for finding symbols not defined in this one.

    • Field Detail

      • serialVersionUID

        private static final long serialVersionUID
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • parent

        protected Namespace parent
        The fall-back namespace for symbols not present in this Namespace.

      • symbols

        protected HashMap<Name,Named> symbols
        The hashmap that maps a name to a symbols of that name if it is defined in this Namespace.

      • localSym

        protected Named localSym
        One defined symbol. Many Namespaces, e.g. those generated when a quantified formula is parsed, define only one new symbol, and it would be a waste of time and space to create a hashmap for that. So symbols is only initialized when there is more than one symbol in this namespace. Otherwise, localSym contains that symbol.

      • numLocalSyms

        protected int numLocalSyms
        The number of symbols defined in this namespace. This is different from symbols.size() because symbols might be null if there is only one symbol in this Namespace.

      • protocol

        protected HashMap<Name,Named> protocol
        Additions can be "recorded" here

    • Constructor Detail

      • Namespace

        public Namespace()
        Construct an empty Namespace without a parent namespace.

      • Namespace

        public Namespace(HashMap<Name,Named> protocol)
        Construct an empty Namespace with protocol protocol and without a parent namespace.

      • Namespace

        public Namespace(Namespace parent)
        Construct a Namespace that uses parent as a fallback for finding symbols not defined in this one.

      • Namespace

        public Namespace(Namespace parent,
                 Named sym)
        Construct a Namespace that uses parent as a fallback for finding symbols not defined in this one. Put an entry for sym in this one.

    • Method Detail

      • add

        public void add(Named sym)
        Adds the object sym to this Namespace. If an object with the same name is already there, it is quietly replaced by sym. Use addSafely() instead if possible. TODO:The problem of saving to localSym, symbols, and symbolRefs is not solved yet.

      • remove

        public void remove(Name name)

      • addSafely

        public void addSafely(Named sym)
        Adds the object sym to this namespace. Throws a runtime exception if an object with the same name is already there.

      • startProtocol

        public void startProtocol()
        "remember" all additions from now on

      • getProtocolled

        public Iterator<Named> getProtocolled()
        gets symbols added since last startProtocol(); resets the protocol

      • lookupLocally

        protected Named lookupLocally(Name name)

      • extended

        public Namespace extended(Named sym)
        creates a new Namespace that has this as parent, and contains an entry for sym.
        Returns:
        the new Namespace

      • extended

        public Namespace extended(Iterable<? extends Named> ext)

      • lookup

        public Named lookup(Name name)
        looks if a registered object is declared in this namespace, if negative it asks its parent
        Parameters:
        name - a Name representing the name of the symbol to look for
        Returns:
        Object with name "name" or null if no such an object has been found

      • lookup

        public Named lookup(String name)
        Convenience method to look up.

      • elements

        public ImmutableList<Named> elements()
        returns list of the elements (not the keys) in this namespace (not about the one of the parent)
        Returns:
        the list of the named objects

      • allElements

        public ImmutableList<Named> allElements()

      • parent

        public Namespace parent()
        returns the fall-back Namespace of this Namespace, i.e. the one where symbols are looked up that are not found in this one.

        public String toString()
        Overrides:

      • copy

        public Namespace copy()

      • reset
